overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval fantasy town market. The character descends wooden stairs and explores a bustling marketplace with timber-framed buildings under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway overlooking medieval market square

events.description: exits covered wooden platform into open air above the market square
reaches bottom of stairs and transitions to walking on muddy ground

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks down wooden stairs from an elevated platform overlooking the town market

entered.detail: wooden roof structure overhead providing partial cover
elevated wooden walkway and staircase descending to street level
medieval half-timbered houses with brown wooden beams and plaster walls
canvas market stalls visible in the town square below

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends a wooden staircase from an elevated covered platform overlooking a medieval market square. Timber-framed buildings line the background as the camera follows him down to street level, transitioning from sheltered to open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town street with blacksmith forge and merchant carts

events.description: passes by blacksmith forge with visible fire glowing inside stone archway
continues walking past wooden cart decorated with red shields

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the muddy street passing by a blacksmith forge and various townspeople

notable_agents.action: townsperson with blonde hair walking past Geralt on the left side

entered.detail: stone archway with glowing orange fire inside and blacksmith tools
wooden wagon with red heraldic shields attached to the side
buildings with stone lower walls and timber upper floors

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, Geralt walks along a muddy path past a blacksmith forge with a glowing fire inside an archway. He passes wooden carts decorated with red shields and navigates between timber-framed buildings while townspeople walk by.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market with canvas merchant stalls

events.description: enters dense market area with multiple canvas-covered merchant stalls
slows and stops near a market stall to examine the goods

agents.ego_description: Geralt browses through the market area, examining goods at the merchant stalls

notable_agents.action: merchant standing behind a stall with hanging sausages and goods

entered.detail: market stalls covered with canvas awnings displaying various goods
wooden carts loaded with crates and merchandise
strings of sausages and dried goods hanging from stall frames

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues into a bustling market area filled with canvas-covered merchant stalls and wooden carts displaying goods. He approaches a stall with hanging merchandise and stops to examine the wares while other townspeople browse nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt descends from a sheltered overlook into the heart of a bustling, sunlit medieval marketplace. It begins with the camera following him down a wooden staircase from an elevated platform, transitioning from the shade of a covered structure into the open air of the town square. As he reaches street level, the scene shifts to a muddy path where he passes a glowing blacksmith forge and wooden carts adorned with red shields. The camera then glides forward into a crowded commercial hub filled with canvas-covered merchant stalls and browsing townspeople, finally coming to a halt as Geralt stops to examine the hanging merchandise of a local vendor.
